the national gas transmission company “transgaz” s.a. is a romanian joint-stock company engaged in the technical operation and management of the national gas transmission system. the company is responsible for the transmission and dispatching of natural gas, as well as research and design activities related to natural gas infrastructure. it also undertakes complementary functions such as purchasing gas for technological use and balancing the national gas transmission system. transgaz is involved in international gas pipeline projects and participates in research and development initiatives. the company is publicly traded on the bucharest stock exchange and is certified for sustainability and environmental management.

description: tata consultancy services limited is an indian multinational technology company that provides information technology consulting, outsourcing, and software services. the company delivers solutions in areas such as digital transformation, cloud computing, cybersecurity, and internet of things, and offers business solutions and specialized technologies. tata consultancy services serves clients in sectors including banking, capital markets, consumer packaged goods, communications, education, energy, healthcare, high technology, insurance, life sciences, manufacturing, public services, retail, travel and logistics, and public sector organizations. the company operates internationally with a global presence and is publicly traded on the national stock exchange and bombay stock exchange.

concentrix corporation is an american technology and services company that provides enterprise technology solutions, business process outsourcing, and business transformation services. the company delivers strategy and design, data and analytics, enterprise technology, digital operations, and specialized offerings such as contact center solutions, ai-powered digital transformation, and cybersecurity services. concentrix serves clients in sectors including automotive, banking, financial services, energy, government, healthcare, media, retail, technology, and travel, and operates internationally across multiple regions. the company is publicly traded and has a history of strategic acquisitions.

capgemini canada inc. is a canadian management and it consulting company engaged in providing services across applications, consulting, infrastructure, financials, business processing, operational technology, engineering, workforce strategies, and technology projects. the company serves a wide range of industries, including utilities, banking, insurance, consumer products, retail, manufacturing, automotive, public sector, and hospitality, with operations across canada and a global network of offices and delivery centers. capgemini is also involved in sustainability initiatives, supporting the un sustainable development goals, and is committed to indigenous relations and digital inclusion.

wipro limited is an indian multinational technology company engaged in information technology, consulting, and business process services. the company provides services in areas such as cloud computing, cybersecurity, data analytics, digital transformation, artificial intelligence, robotics, and engineering. wipro serves clients across sectors including banking, financial services, telecommunications, media and information services, consumer goods, education, public sector, retail, travel, energy, manufacturing, aerospace, automotive, industrial manufacturing, natural resources, oil and gas, utilities, healthcare, life sciences, medical devices, technology products and services, and consumer electronics. the company operates globally, with a presence in major markets across the americas, asia pacific, africa, europe, middle east, and india.

dws limited, known as dws group, is an australian consulting company engaged in it, business, and management consulting services. the company serves corporate clients and government entities across australia, providing services such as program and project management, business analytics and data, strategic advisory, productivity services, managed application services, and robotics process automation. dws group is iso certified and is part of the hcltech group, a global technology company.

ntt data group corporation is a japanese multinational information technology service and consulting company engaged in it consulting, business process services, it modernization, and managed services. the company serves a wide range of industries, including automotive, banking, education, energy, healthcare, insurance, life sciences, manufacturing, retail, telecommunications, media, technology, and travel. ntt data also provides cloud solutions, cybersecurity, data and artificial intelligence, digital workplace solutions, edge computing, enterprise application platforms, generative ai, global data centers, network services, and sustainability services. the company operates internationally and is part of the ntt group.

genpact luxembourg s.a.r.l is an american information technology services, consulting, and outsourcing company engaged in business process outsourcing and technology solutions. the company provides services in data and ai, digital technology, advisory services, and business functions such as finance and accounting, risk and compliance, supply chain management, customer care, human resources management, sales and commercial, sourcing and procurement, sustainability, and trust and safety. genpact serves clients in over 35 countries and operates globally, with a presence in the united states and india.

description: fujitsu limited is a japanese multinational corporation engaged in information and communications technology (ict) equipment and services. the company provides it services and solutions, including business and digital transformation, network and security services, it and infrastructure operations, hybrid it and cloud services, and consulting. fujitsu serves a wide range of industries, including manufacturing, mobility and transportation, retail, public sector, finance, healthcare, and resources and energy. the company also operates in telecommunications, computer hardware, consumer electronics, software, data storage, cloud computing, and semiconductors. fujitsu is publicly traded on the tokyo stock exchange and is part of the furukawa group.

telefónica innovación digital, s.l.u., known as telefónica venture builder, is a spanish company that operates as a venture builder and digital innovation provider. the company supports the development of digital business ideas and startups, offering services such as ideation, business plan development, and post-creation monitoring. telefónica venture builder also engages in the creation of new companies based on digital technologies and collaborates with startups in sectors including financial services, e-commerce, media, entertainment, and logistics. additionally, the company is involved in initiatives such as the open gateway project, which provides standardized apis for telecommunications networks, and the camara project, which aims to standardize network apis across the industry.

description: cgi inc. is a canadian multinational information technology consulting and software development company. the company provides business consulting, systems integration, managed it services, application services, infrastructure services, business process management, and intellectual property solutions. cgi also offers professional training and coaching, and is involved in the development of iot applications, cloud computing, and application development testing and maintenance. the company serves clients in sectors such as banking, communications, government, healthcare, insurance, life sciences, manufacturing, oil and gas, retail, transportation, utilities, aerospace, maritime, media, housing, construction, and space, with operations in over 40 countries.

atos se is a french multinational company that provides information technology services, digital transformation solutions, and consulting. the company delivers services in cloud and infrastructure, cybersecurity, data and artificial intelligence, application services, smart platforms, and digital workplace solutions. atos also offers consulting and advisory services, as well as managed services and integration services. the company operates internationally, serving businesses, institutions, and communities in over 61 countries. atos is part of the gaia-x initiative and is involved in sustainability initiatives, including decarbonization and digital transformation.

epam systems, inc. is an american software engineering company that provides software engineering, digital platform engineering, and digital product design services. the company also offers digital transformation consulting, cloud and data analytics solutions, artificial intelligence and cybersecurity services, and digital business process outsourcing. epam serves clients in sectors such as consumer goods, financial services, healthcare, energy, and automotive, and operates internationally with offices in the usa, europe, asia, and the middle east. the company is a member of the mach alliance and is publicly traded on the new york stock exchange.

leidos, inc. is an american company that operates as a systems integrator, engineering firm, and information technology services provider. the company delivers solutions in national security, health, defense, energy, government, and space sectors, with activities including systems integration, engineering, and it services. leidos also provides digital modernization, cybersecurity, and enterprise software solutions, as well as cloud and artificial intelligence services. its operations serve both civilian and defense agencies, as well as commercial markets, and the company holds government-wide acquisition, indefinite delivery, and blanket purchase agreement contract vehicles.

description: booz allen hamilton inc. is an american company that provides management and technology consulting, cybersecurity services, digital transformation solutions, and artificial intelligence and cloud computing services. the company also offers software development, mission readiness support, and professional training and coaching. booz allen serves government agencies, commercial enterprises, international organizations, and nonprofits, with operations in the united states, southeast asia, and europe. the company is publicly traded and is a component of the russell 1000 index.

mphasis corporation is an indian multinational information technology service and consulting company engaged in technology solutions, cloud services, and digital transformation. the company provides services in application services, blockchain, cognitive computing, cybersecurity, it value stream acceleration, agile it operations, experience design, governance, risk and compliance, infrastructure services, modernization, data management, and product engineering. mphasis serves clients across sectors such as banking, insurance, healthcare, life sciences, oil and gas, public sector, technology, communications, energy and utilities, logistics, and manufacturing, with operations in the americas, asia pacific, africa, europe, and oceania. the company also operates as a business process outsourcing provider and is publicly traded on the bombay stock exchange and the national stock exchange of india.

globant s.a. is an international it and software development company engaged in ai-driven software development, business transformation solutions, and cloud services. the company provides software product development, mobile application development, social network development, and mainframe migration, serving clients in sectors such as automotive, healthcare, media and entertainment, education, retail, hospitality, sports, energy, consumer goods, and manufacturing. globant operates globally, with offices in multiple countries and a focus on sustainability and ethical practices.

science applications international corporation, inc., known as saic, is an american technology company that provides mission integration, information technology services, engineering, and professional services for federal civilian, state and local, defense, intelligence community, and space sectors. the company delivers solutions in areas such as mission it, enterprise it, cybersecurity, cloud services, and artificial intelligence-driven tools. saic operates internationally, with offices in the united states, australia, canada, and other countries.
core_offerings: Federal and State IT Solutions Development

description: tietoevry oyj is a finnish company engaged in software development, digital engineering, and it consulting. the company provides services in cloud solutions, data-driven business transformation, intelligent automation, user experience services, cybersecurity, and ai-powered solutions. tietoevry serves a broad range of industries, including automotive, financial services, healthcare, education, energy, manufacturing, public sector, pulp, paper, and packaging, as well as fintech and telecom sectors. the company operates internationally, with offices in finland, norway, sweden, denmark, estonia, france, germany, india, and the united states.

asgn incorporated is an american information technology services company that provides it consulting, professional staffing, and enterprise software solutions for commercial and government clients. the company operates through two main segments: apex systems, which delivers technology and creative digital marketing services, and ecs, which provides mission-critical it services to government agencies. asgn also offers management consulting, professional training and coaching, and digital services, including data and analytics, artificial intelligence and machine learning, and cloud solutions. the company serves a broad range of industries, including financial services, healthcare, technology, media, telecommunications, business and government services, and defense, and maintains operations in north america, mexico, canada, and latin america.

caci international inc is an american multinational company that provides professional services and information technology solutions for national security, government, and private sector clients. the company operates in consulting, defense, information technology, and outsourcing, offering services such as enterprise it, mission and engineering support, space and spectrum superiority, cyber and digital solutions, and government property management. caci also delivers business intelligence and software development, including enterprise and business systems, and supports its operations with a corporate service management system, virtual university, and related tools and platforms. the company is publicly traded on the new york stock exchange and is certified for sustainability and corporate social responsibility.

primary_naics.label: Environmental Consulting Services

description: yeşil bir gelecek danışmanlık teknoloji yazılım a.ş., dba yeşil bir gelecek, is a turkish private company that provides carbon footprint calculation services, environmental consulting, and software development for individuals and organizations. the company operates under the european skdm framework, offering technology solutions and platforms for carbon footprint assessment, and is registered with the european greensme platform. its activities include consulting, software development, and technology solutions related to sustainability and environmental responsibility.

description: mon be fluides is a french engineering company engaged in the design and execution of fluid systems for tertiary buildings, including schools, clinics, hotels, hospitals, and other similar facilities. the company provides integrated engineering services covering heating, ventilation, and air conditioning, plumbing, electrical, and fire safety systems. mon be fluides also offers building information modeling (bim) and 3d modeling solutions, and collaborates with industry partners on complex projects such as industrial energy storage sites. its services are available to a diverse range of clients, including educational institutions, healthcare providers, hospitality businesses, care facilities, companies, offices, and sports complexes.
core_offerings: Technical Coordination and Conflict Resolution Services

description: utilify s.r.l. is an american company engaged in energy consulting and digital auditing services, with a focus on energy efficiency and digital auditing solutions. the company provides digital auditing, back office digitalization, energy efficiency projects, carbon footprint monitoring, and energy management solutions for businesses across various industries. utilify also develops intelligent iot solutions that collect data from electricity meters to perform digital audits and monitor electricity bills, supporting energy optimization and cost reduction.

description: tri hita consulting is an indonesian consulting firm specialized in sustainability, energy efficiency, and climate change. the company provides strategic advisory services, including climate change strategy, net-zero targets, and sustainable finance, as well as carbon management, esg and sustainable finance, and capacity-building programs. it also offers training and technical assistance for the financial industry, such as training on carbon trading and energy efficiency financing, and supports public and private sector clients in areas including sustainable energy policy, climate policy, and environmental and social assessments. tri hita consulting collaborates with organizations such as the asean centre for energy, tamaris hydro, pt indonesia steel tube works, and the indonesian stock exchange, and is involved in projects related to ghg emission reduction methodologies and sustainable transitions.

description: global tech solve pvt ltd, known as gt solve, is an indian private company engaged in engineering, sourcing, and manufacturing solutions for global mobility programs. the company provides design, development, and supply of high-precision components and subassemblies for electric vehicles, software-defined vehicles, and industrial platforms, serving automotive original equipment manufacturers, software-defined vehicle manufacturers, and industrial platform developers. gt solve operates internationally, with regional hubs in north america, hong kong, vietnam, and china, and offers services such as automation, engineering alignment with production, and the integration of design, manufacturing, and delivery under a single platform. the company also operates as a manufacturing as a service provider, supporting clients with a scalable delivery model and a network of calibrated talent and supplier partners.

description: terragreen solutions gmbh, dba terragreen, is a german company specialized in environmental solutions focused on sustainable development, biodiversity, and climate stability. the company provides services in afforestation, reforestation, species protection, habitat restoration, co₂ storage, and biodiversity compensation, supporting projects from initiation to completion. terragreen also offers project management, including securing and developing compensation areas, obtaining necessary permits, and ensuring compliance for landowners, public institutions, and project developers. the company utilizes proprietary databases, digital mapping, and ai-driven processes to optimize project execution and deliver verified compensation solutions.

description: ecoexpert green consulting s.r.l is a romanian consulting company engaged in environmental, social, and governance (esg) solutions. the company provides services such as carbon footprint calculation, sustainability reporting, and net zero compliance, utilizing technologies including blockchain, ai, and sensors. ecoexpert green consulting serves a diverse client base, including large enterprises, start-ups, and financial institutions, and offers modular esg solutions to support companies in achieving sustainability objectives. the company also operates a platform for esg reporting and maintains a network of partners and clients to facilitate access to sustainability tools and resources.
